title: BEM-866 find dispatchable workflows
objective:
Run script:
"""
outdir = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/bem866_dispatchable_candidates')
outdir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
count = 0
for root in ['governance/workflow_dispatch_results', 'governance/codex/results', 'governance/runtime/curator_dispatch', '.github/workflows']:
    base = Path(root)
    if not base.exists():
        continue
    for f in base.rglob('*'):
        if count >= 100:
            break
        if f.is_file() and f.suffix.lower() in ['.json', '.md', '.yml', '.yaml', '.txt']:
            text = f.read_text(encoding='utf-8', errors='ignore')[:50000]
            low = text.lower()
            if ('workflow_dispatch' in low or 'workflow' in low) and ('dispatched' in low or 'workflow_dispatch:' in low or 'workflow_dispatch_status' in low):
                safe = ''.join(ch if ch.isalnum() else '_' for ch in str(f))[:140]
                marker = outdir / (str(count).zfill(3) + '_' + safe + '.md')
                flags = []
                for tok in ['DISPATCHED', 'workflow_dispatch:', 'workflow_dispatch_status', 'workflow:', 'claude', 'auditor', 'curator']:
                    if tok.lower() in low:
                        flags.append(tok)
                marker.write_text('# BEM-866 dispatchable candidate\nPath: ' + str(f) + '\nFlags: ' + ', '.join(flags) + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
                changed_files.append(str(marker))
                count += 1
summary = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM866_DISPATCHABLE_CANDIDATES_INDEX.md')
summary.write_text('# BEM-866 dispatchable candidates\nCount: ' + str(count) + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(summary))
ops_applied.append('dispatchable workflow candidates scanned: ' + str(count))
"""
No issue comments.
